sub_modules.conv2d_coord: Combinational column wrap and end-of-line detector for raster stream addressing.
sub_modules.conv2d_coeffs: Combinational default coefficient ROM, using the 3x3 Gaussian kernel for the required benchmark and identity fallback for other odd sizes.
sub_modules.conv2d_dot_product: Combinational matrix-vector multiply-accumulate over the flattened convolution window.
sub_modules.conv2d_saturate: Combinational output width selection from the widened accumulator.
sub_modules.conv2d_window_pack: Combinational window pass-through module used as an independent pack/interconnect boundary.
